checklists.title: Spring wake-up
checklists.gusLine: North side grows the mildew — walk the perimeter. And how is the serenity?
items: Test sump pump with a bucket of water
Clean gutters if tree cover is heavy
Check grading: water should drain away from foundation
Inspect roof from ground for winter damage
Open outdoor faucets; check for freeze cracks

checklists.title: Summer watch
checklists.gusLine: Fans counterclockwise in summer. Water the grass at dawn, not noon — Sod Father would approve.
items: Trim vegetation away from siding and AC condenser

checklists.title: Fall button-up
checklists.gusLine: First freeze is coming. Blow out the irrigation if you have one. Seal the drafts before Banks McCoin bills you for heat.
items: Reverse ceiling fans to clockwise-on-low for winter
Clean gutters before leaf dump ends

checklists.title: Winter hold
checklists.gusLine: If the ice dams start, check attic insulation and ventilation — don't just chip the roof like a maniac.
items: Know your water main shutoff location
Keep cabinet doors open on extreme cold nights (pipes)
Clear snow from dryer/furnace exhaust and vents
Watch for ice dams and icicles at eaves
